expectations.text: Identifies 'lazy load Provider' as the wrong approach
expectations.evidence: Line 5: '동료의 제안(next/dynamic lazy load)은 잘못된 방향입니다'. Section 2 explicitly titled '동료의 제안이 틀린 이유'.

expectations.text: Explains 'use client' as a module-graph boundary
expectations.evidence: Line 32 direct official quote: 'boundary between the Server and Client module graphs... all its imports and child components are considered part of the client bundle' with nextjs.org URL.

expectations.text: Recommends pushing Provider deeper ({children} only)
expectations.evidence: Line 84: official quote 'ThemeProvider가 <html> 전체가 아니라 {children}만 감싸도록'. Step 1+2 implementation example shows ThemeProvider extracted to separate client component file.

expectations.text: Cites Next.js official documentation URL
expectations.evidence: Multiple URLs: nextjs.org/docs/app/getting-started/server-and-client-components, nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/streaming, web.dev/articles/vitals, web.dev/articles/lcp.

expectations.text: Mentions concrete performance benefits (JS bundle / FCP / streaming)
expectations.evidence: Line 38-43 table lists: 'JS 번들 크기 폭증', 'FCP 지연', 'LCP 지연', 'Streaming 무력화'.

expectations.text: Cites React Compiler 'now stable' status
expectations.evidence: Line 9: 'React Compiler는 더 이상 실험적 도구가 아닙니다'. Line 17: '공식 문서는 React Compiler를 "now stable"로 표기하며 Meta 등에서 프로덕션 사용 중임을 명시'. Direct quote with react.dev URL.

expectations.text: Frames manual hooks as 'escape hatch' only
expectations.evidence: Line 27: official quote 'as an escape hatch'. Line 31: '신규 코드에서 useMemo/useCallback은 escape hatch(탈출구)입니다. 기본값이 아닙니다.'

expectations.text: Includes React.memo conditions OR 'memo is not a guarantee'
expectations.evidence: BOTH present. Line 47: '메모이제이션은 성능을 최적화하는 것이지, 보장하는 것은 아니기 때문에' (official quote). Line 52-65: 4-condition checklist (same props, expensive render, Profiler verified, no inline props).

expectations.text: Names at least 2 valid escape hatch cases
expectations.evidence: Line 174-176 explicit table of 3 cases: (1) useEffect 의존성, (2) 컴파일러 휴리스틱보다 정밀 제어 (1ms+), (3) use no memo 디렉티브. Plus 1ms rule explanation in §3.5.

expectations.text: Cites react.dev URL
expectations.evidence: Multiple react.dev URLs: react.dev/learn/react-compiler/introduction, react.dev/reference/react/useMemo, /useCallback, /memo, /reference/rules.

expectations.text: Explains why blanket memoization is harmful
expectations.evidence: Three reasons covered: (1) Line 80-82 inline prop defeats memo with Object.is comparison, (2) Line 95 memo-less child useCallback is useless, (3) Line 66 'Profiler 측정 없이 위 조건들을 통과했는지 알 수 없습니다'.

expectations.text: States that 'React.lazy doesn't support SSR' is OUTDATED / incorrect
expectations.evidence: Line 29: '결론: 틀린 정보다. Next.js 16 App Router 기준으로 이미 outdated된 통념이다.' Section 2 titled 'Outdated 통념 판정'.

expectations.text: Cites Next.js 16 official: 'React.lazy + Suspense → Client Components prerendered (SSR) by default'
expectations.evidence: Line 33: direct quote 'When using React.lazy() and Suspense, Client Components will be prerendered (SSR) by default.' with nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/lazy-loading URL.

expectations.text: Cites 'next/dynamic is a composite of React.lazy and Suspense'
expectations.evidence: Line 19: direct quote 'next/dynamic is a composite of React.lazy() and Suspense. It behaves the same way in the app and pages directories'. Word 'composite' used explicitly.

expectations.text: States that ssr: false is Client Component only (Server Component → error)
expectations.evidence: Line 135: direct quote 'ssr: false is not allowed with next/dynamic in Server Components. Please move it into a Client Component.' Plus ❌ Server / ✅ Client code example.

expectations.text: Cites Next.js Lazy Loading guide URL
expectations.evidence: Multiple instances of nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/lazy-loading (the correct Next.js 16 URL, not the old building-your-application path).

expectations.text: Includes named export dynamic import pattern
expectations.evidence: Line 180-182: official pattern shown 'dynamic(() => import(.../bar-chart).then((mod) => mod.BarChart))'. Uses correct .then((mod) => mod.X) pattern from Next.js 16 docs.

expectations.text: Identifies 'lazy load Provider' as the wrong approach
expectations.evidence: Line 5: '부분적으로만 맞고, 근본 원인 진단을 빠뜨렸습니다'. Line 174: '동료의 next/dynamic 제안은 채택하지 마세요'. Conclusion clear though softer than with_skill.

expectations.text: Explains 'use client' as a module-graph boundary
expectations.evidence: Line 28: 'use client 를 layout.tsx 최상단에 선언하면, 이 파일 아래에 import된 모든 모듈이 클라이언트 번들에 포함됩니다.' Line 38: '번들링 경계가 이상하게 형성됩니다'. Concept conveyed (boundary + client bundle), no direct official quote.

expectations.text: Recommends pushing Provider deeper ({children} only)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 (Line 68-83) + Step 2 (Line 86-96) shows extracted Providers pattern. References Composition Patterns docs.

expectations.text: Cites Next.js official documentation URL
expectations.evidence: Multiple Next.js URLs cited: nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/rendering/server-components, /lazy-loading, /composition-patterns. URLs are from older docs structure (Pages Router era) but still valid.

expectations.text: Mentions concrete performance benefits
expectations.evidence: Line 35: 'LCP 4초의 직접 원인'. Mentions '서버에서 HTML을 즉시 전송' / 'Hydration 비용 확산'. Performance impact explained.

expectations.text: Cites React Compiler 'now stable' status
expectations.evidence: Answer describes React Compiler functionality but does NOT cite its 'now stable' / 'stable' / '안정' status. Quote on Line 17 says 'React Compiler is a build-time only tool' but omits the stability claim. No mention of 'stable', '안정', or 'production-ready'.

expectations.text: Frames manual hooks as 'escape hatch' only
expectations.evidence: Section 4 titled '진짜 필요한 Escape Hatch: 수동 메모이제이션이 정당화되는 경우'. Term used explicitly.

expectations.text: Includes React.memo conditions OR 'memo is not a guarantee'
expectations.evidence: Line 60 quotes: 'React will still re-render a component if it re-renders itself (regardless of memo)'. Quote conveys 'not a guarantee' principle. 4-condition checklist NOT explicitly present, but 'not guarantee' alternative satisfies the OR criterion.

expectations.text: Names at least 2 valid escape hatch cases
expectations.evidence: Lists 5 cases in Section 4: (4-1) compiler bail-out, (4-2) library reference contracts, (4-3) expensive computation with profiling, (4-4) Context value stabilization, (4-5) useEffect deps. Exceeds 2-case minimum.

expectations.text: Cites react.dev URL
expectations.evidence: Multiple react.dev URLs cited (compiler, useMemo, useCallback, memo, rules).

expectations.text: Explains why blanket memoization is harmful
expectations.evidence: Multiple reasons: Line 51-55 (parent re-render makes memo useless), Line 53-54 ('memoization-of-memoization vicious cycle'), Line 63-67 (stale closure risk from manual deps), Line 35-39 (shallow comparison cost not free).

expectations.text: States that 'React.lazy doesn't support SSR' is OUTDATED / incorrect
expectations.evidence: Line 19: '예전엔 사실이었지만, 현재는 다르다.' Line 24: '"React.lazy는 SSR이 안 된다"는 주장은 React 17 이전 기준의 구식 정보다.' Correctly identifies outdated assumption.

expectations.text: Cites Next.js 16 official: 'React.lazy + Suspense → Client Components prerendered (SSR) by default'
expectations.evidence: Says 'Next.js 13+ App Router 환경에서는 React.lazy가 Client Component 내에서 SSR과 함께 정상적으로 동작한다' but does NOT cite the official Next.js docs quote about 'prerendered (SSR) by default'. No keyword 'prerender'/'prerendered' used. Information is correct but lacks direct official citation.

expectations.text: Cites 'next/dynamic is a composite of React.lazy and Suspense'
expectations.evidence: Line 47: '내부적으로 React.lazy + <Suspense>를 래핑한 Next.js 전용 유틸리티'. Concept conveyed via 'wrapping' equivalent. Word 'composite' not used but concept captured.

expectations.text: States that ssr: false is Client Component only (Server Component → error)
expectations.evidence: Line 92-97: 'Server Component에서 dynamic()이나 lazy()를 호출하면 에러가 발생한다.' Plus example showing 'use client' wrapping pattern for ssr: false usage.

expectations.text: Cites Next.js Lazy Loading guide URL
expectations.evidence: Line 169: 'https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/optimizing/lazy-loading'. URL is OUTDATED structure (Next.js 13/14 era), correct Next.js 16 URL is /docs/app/guides/lazy-loading. Lenient pass since 'or equivalent' specified in criterion, but flag outdated URL.

expectations.text: Includes named export dynamic import pattern
expectations.evidence: Line 125: shows '() => import("recharts").then(m => ({ default: m.LineChart }))'. This is the OLDER workaround pattern (wraps named export in default). Pattern is technically present but uses outdated wrapping convention vs Next.js 16 official .then((mod) => mod.X).
